temporal_description: The audio opens with a low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score, creating a tense and serious atmosphere. A close-up, over-the-shoulder shot focuses on a man with short, graying hair, seen from behind. He is wearing a light-colored suit jacket. The lighting is dim and has a greenish tint, casting the background in soft focus. In the upper left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The camera remains steady, maintaining its focus on the man's back. The camera angle shifts slightly, revealing the man's profile as he turns his head to the right. He has a serious and contemplative expression. The background remains dark and indistinct, with the greenish light continuing to dominate the scene. The white Chinese text is still present in the upper left. A deep, resonant thud, like a heavy object being placed down, punctuates the quiet, ambient soundscape. The shot changes to a medium view of the same man, now facing forward. He is seated and looking slightly off-camera with a stern, focused gaze. Behind him, two other men stand in the background; one is in a dark suit, and the other, on the right, wears a dark shirt and has his arms crossed. The setting appears to be an indoor space, possibly an office or a room in a building, with a window and a metal grate visible behind the men. The overall color palette remains dark and saturated with a green hue. The white Chinese text, "风行网," is still visible in the upper left corner. The music continues to build a sense of anticipation and gravity.
